description: Style NoteFor some serious street cred, try this pair of playboy high-tops. With a high collar, these kicks can be worn with rolled-up denims and a tonal tee. Keep your T-shirt monochrome for a balanced look. This versatile pair's collar can be rolled-down for an alternative look!Product DetailsRed and cream check printed upper with high-top styling and a carbon-rubber toe boxCentral lace-ups with a fabric tongue and innerEVA midsole with foxing at the toe regionTPU outsole with bunny shaped lugs all overMaterial and CareCanvasWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
